title: astragalus × hybridus
intro: Astragalus × hybridus, also known as hybrid milkvetch, is a hybrid plant species in the legume family that is native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which are attributed to its high concentration of isoflavones and other bioactive compounds. The medicinal properties of Astragalus × hybridus have been shown to provide various health benefits, including improved immune function, reduced inflammation, and enhanced cardiovascular health. Astragalus × hybridus can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or dried extract, and is often used in herbal medicine to support overall health and well-being.
